reason: All specific factual claims check out: Marietta memory modification is book-only, Potterwatch/equality speech is book-only, Minister appointment is explicitly noted as omitted from DH2 by the HP Wiki, and the preserved elements (Patronus warning, battle coordination) are correctly identified. The score of 76 and the dimension breakdown are consistent with the documented omissions. Minor uncertainty only on whether 76 vs ~80 is the right calibration for a supporting character whose surface portrayal is faithful.
